topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Flix. Combines functional programming with first-class Datalog constraints.

topics.label: Types & Expressions
topics.description: Int32, String, Bool, List, Map, Option, Result. Hindley-Milner type inference.

topics.label: Functions & Pattern Matching
topics.description: def with pattern matching, pipelines (|>), and first-class functions.

topics.label: Algebraic Data Types
topics.description: enum for tagged unions. Exhaustive pattern matching.

topics.label: Datalog Constraints
topics.description: First-class Datalog — declare facts and rules, query with solve.

topics.label: Effect System
topics.description: Polymorphic effect system tracks purity. Pure functions are enforced.

topics.label: Regions & Mutability
topics.description: Scoped mutation with regions for controlled side effects.

topics.label: Java Interop
topics.description: Call Java libraries from Flix. Runs on the JVM.
